violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Pans of cooling par cooked chicken (did not reach 165) stored above ready to eat salads in upright refrigerator.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dried food debris on food chopper.
